name: Black Angus Burger with Cheddar Cheese and Gr
recipeIngredient: 3 grilled poblano peppers, seeded and sliced into thirds
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. In a large mixing bowl, season the Angus beef with salt and pepper. Refrigerate until ready to use.
3. When ready to use, form the beef into 1-inch thick disks.
4. Grill for five minutes on each side for medium rare.
5. During the last five minutes of grilling, top each disk with a slice of cheddar cheese.
6. When finished grilling, place half of the roll on one half of the burger and add baby red oak lettuce, poblano peppers, vinaigrette, and pickled red onions.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
